narrative: Middle East escalation drives a geopolitical risk premium as Iran targets a UAE tanker and allegedly strikes a US warship — WTI crude surges toward $104.0; gold lower -1.61%; equities +0.29%; DXY +0.26%; VIX 18.2. USD/JPY firms to 157.14 as the +300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets marginal risk-premium demand. EUR/USD retreats to 1.1701 as the +175bp Fed-ECB differential anchors the downside. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC tomorrow.
